channel.title: Naija Digest Online
channel.description: Nigeria’s one-stop hub for breaking news, tech, football, celebrity gossip, Naija music, live TV, exchange rates and trending topics.

item.title: US strikes hit Iran for seventh consecutive night

item.title: Relocate to safe location, NEMA tells residents in flood-prone communities
item.dc:creator: Tribune
item.description: The Director-General of the National Emergency Management Agency (NEMA), Mrs. Zubaida Umar, on Saturday advised residents of communities at risk of flooding across the country to take proactive measures to safeguard their lives and property as the rainy season intensifies. Mrs. Umar said the current

item.title: Onikate to confer Okanlomo title on Lagos businessman Rilwan Bamgbala
item.dc:creator: The Sun
item.description: The Onikate of Ikate Surulere, Oba Lateef Atanda Adams, has announced plans to confer the traditional title of Okanlomo Ikate Surulere on Lagos businessman and hospitality entrepreneur Rilwan Bamgbala. The post Onikate to confer Okanlomo title on Lagos businessman Rilwan Bamgbala appeared first on T

item.title: Court Orders Final Forfeiture Of 52 Houses Worth Billions In Lagos
item.dc:creator: New Telegraph
item.description: The Federal High Court sitting in Ikoyi, Lagos has ordered the final forfeiture of 52 terrace and maisonette units in Lekki to the Federal Government of Nigeria. Justice Alexandra Owoeye gave the ruling on Wednesday, July 15, 2026, following an application filed by the Lagos Zonal Directorate 2 of t

item.title: Google is open-sourcing its 3D emoji
item.dc:creator: The Verge
item.description: Now, if you want to, you can use Google's 3D emoji in your own creations. The company shared some details about how it went about designing the little pictograms and why, as part of World Emoji Day on Friday. Things you might not necessarily worry about in a 2D illustration suddenly become very impo

item.title: World Cup: Rio Ferdinand snubs Messi, Mbappe, Ronaldo, names favourite player
item.dc:creator: Daily Post
item.description: Former Manchester United and England defender, Rio Ferdinand, has picked his favourite player at the 2026 FIFA World Cup. Snubbing the likes of Lionel Messi, Cristiano Ronaldo and Kylian Mbappe, Rio Ferdinand expressed his admiration for Nigerian born France international, Michael Olise. The 47-year

item.title: Video: Kayinsola Ajayi beats Seville again to win London Diamond League’s 100m
item.dc:creator: Vanguard
item.description: Kayinsola Ajayi raced to victory on Saturday, July 18 at the London Diamond League 2026 in the men’s 100 metres. He clocked 9.84 seconds, fending off reigning world champion Oblique Seville in the process. The Jamaican Seville came second in 9.87 at the London National Stadium, with Romell Grave of

item.title: International experts enumerate China’s role in advancing global AI governance
item.dc:creator: The Sun
item.description: Balancing innovation and safety has become a central topic at the 2026 World Artificial Intelligence Conference (WAIC). The post International experts enumerate China’s role in advancing global AI governance appeared first on The Sun Nigeria.

item.title: Belgian Grand Prix | Qualifying Highlights
item.dc:creator: Sky Sports Football
item.description: Highlights from qualifying for the 2026 Belgian Grand Prix.

item.title: Three Chinese, others arrested over alleged illegal mining in Nasarawa
item.dc:creator: Daily Post
item.description: The Nasarawa deputy governor, Emmanuel Akabe, has reportedly led security personnel to arrest three Chinese nationals and several others over alleged illegal activities in Amba community, Kokona Local Government Area of Nasarawa State. The enforcement operation targeted an illegal mining site where

item.title: UNILORIN Reiterates Commitment To Prioritising Students’ Welfare
item.dc:creator: New Telegraph
item.description: The management of the University of Ilorin (UNILORIN) has restated its commitment to prioritising the welfare of its students, saying they are the main reason for the existence of the instution. This assurance was given during a meeting between the management and a delegation of the National Associa

item.title: ‘Tinubu sent me to prison’ — Sowore alleges impossible bail conditions for suspects
item.dc:creator: Daily Post
item.description: Presidential candidate of the African Action Congress, AAC, Omoyele Sowore has alleged that President Bola Tinubu was responsible for his imprisonment, while raising concerns over what he described as the plight of hundreds of inmates awaiting trial at the Kuje Correctional Centre in Abuja. Sowore m
